Container.Name: family-tree-viewer
Container.Overview: A polished, read-only interactive family tree viewer for any Gramps Web instance. Point it at your Gramps Web API and share a clean, no-login tree with relatives - it auto-authenticates at runtime with a read-only account you supply via container variables.[br][br][b]Features:[/b][br]- Smooth infinite pan / zoom / fit canvas[br]- Breadcrumb navigation between focused people[br]- Type-ahead search with results dropdown[br]- Generation filter (show/hide tree depths)[br]- Person detail panel (dates, places, relationships, photos)[br]- Light/dark mode + mobile responsive[br]- Configurable title/branding[br][br][b]Setup:[/b] Set [b]Gramps API URL[/b] to your Gramps Web instance (e.g. http://192.168.1.10:5050), then supply a [b]read-only[/b] Gramps account in the Viewer User/Password fields. The viewer fetches a token at boot and refreshes it silently. Use a dedicated Guest/member account so private records stay hidden.
Container.Requires: A running Gramps Web instance reachable from this container (see the grampsweb-aio template).

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the viewer web interface (maps to container port 80)

Config.Name: Gramps API URL
Config.Description: Base URL of your Gramps Web instance, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:5050 (no trailing /api). The viewer proxies /api to this host.

Config.Name: Viewer User
Config.Description: Username of a READ-ONLY Gramps account the viewer auto-authenticates with. Use a dedicated Guest/member account, not an admin.

Config.Name: Viewer Password
Config.Description: Password for the read-only viewer account above.

Config.Name: Title / Branding
Config.Description: Title shown in the header and browser tab (e.g. 'Brewer Family Tree').
